name: Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An (Grand Sunrise Palace Hoi An)
address: 320 Cua Dai Street, Cam Chau, Hoi An City, Cẩm Châu, Hội An, Việt Nam
description:
Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An

Khám phá Hội An nhiều hơn khi quý khách ở lại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An và trải nghiệm tất cả những lợi ích của vị trí thực sự trung tâm.
Hãy tận dụng vô vàn dịch vụ và tiện ích không có gì sánh được tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An. Khách sạn cung cấp quyền truy cập internet miễn phí giúp quý khách giữ liên lạc trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.
Lên kế hoạch trước cho chuyến đi đến và đi từ sân bay của quý khách với các dịch vụ vận tải dễ dàng đặt trước của khách sạn. Các dịch vụ taxi, cho thuê xe hơi và xe đưa đón được khách sạn cung cấp giúp quý khách dễ dàng lên kế hoạch cho các chuyến đi trong ngày, chuyến tham quan và hơn thế nữa quanh Hội An. Nếu quý khách dự định đến bằng xe hơi, quý khách sẽ đánh giá cao bãi đỗ xe miễn phí ngay tại chỗ của khách sạn. Luôn nhận được sự hỗ trợ quý khách cần với các dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm két sắt, nhận phòng hoặc trả phòng nhanh, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng.
Nếu quý khách cần, chuyến du lịch và dịch vụ vé thậm chí có thể giúp quý khách đặt vé và đặt chỗ tại tất cả các buổi trình diễn và chương trình hay nhất gần đó. Khách sạn thậm chí cung cấp lò sưởi để mang đến không khí ấm áp vào những đêm lạnh giá. Dịch vụ giặt khô và dịch vụ giặt là tại chỗ của khách sạn giúp quý khách giữ những bộ trang phục du lịch yêu thích của mình sạch sẽ để quý khách có thể đóng gói đồ đạc ít hơn. Cảm thấy lười biếng? Các tiện ích trong phòng như dịch vụ tại phòng, dịch vụ tại phòng 24 giờ và dọn phòng hằng ngày giúp quý khách tận dụng tối đa thời gian trong phòng. Quý khách cũng có thể mua những món đồ du lịch và đồ lặt vặt tại cửa hàng tiện lợi mà không cần phải rời Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An. Vì lý do sức khỏe, hút thuốc bị cấm tại bất kỳ nơi nào trong khuôn viên khách sạn. Chỉ được phép hút thuốc tại các khu vực hút thuốc được chỉ định do khách sạn cung cấp. Phòng nghỉ có tất cả tiện nghi mà quý khách cần để có một đêm ngủ ngon giấc. Một số phòng được trang bị rèm che ánh sáng và điều hòa để thuận tiện cho quý khách. Mỗi thời gian ở là một trải nghiệm mới với nhiều tùy chọn bố trí phòng thú vị tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An, bao gồm các phòng có ban công hoặc sân hiên và phòng khách riêng. Giải trí trong phòng như truyền hình cáp và ti-vi được cung cấp cho khách trong một số phòng được chọn. Quý khách có thể yên tâm khi biết rằng máy pha trà hoặc cà phê, nước đóng chai, cà phê hòa tan và tủ lạnh nhỏ chứa đồ uống, trà hòa tan và tủ lạnh sẵn có trong một số phòng chọn lọc. Quý khách có thể luôn sảng khoái và sạch sẽ với áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc và vật dụng tắm rửa được cung cấp trong một số phòng tắm của khách.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Mỗi buổi sáng, quý khách có thể thức dậy để thưởng thức bữa sáng ngon miễn phí tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An. Mọi người đều thích một tách cà phê ngon! Một quán cà phê ngay trong khuôn viên có nghĩa là quý khách có thể thưởng thức một tách cà phê thật sự, mới pha vào mỗi buổi sáng -- hoặc bất cứ lúc nào quý khách thích. Nếu không muốn ra ngoài ăn, quý khách luôn có thể chọn các lựa chọn ăn uống ngon miệng tại khách sạn. Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An sẵn sàng phục vụ nhu cầu cụ thể nhất của quý khách. Các lựa chọn loại món ăn bao gồm ăn kiêng theo luật Hồi giáo, có sẵn cho những khách nghỉ có hạn chế về chế độ ăn uống.
Một đêm tại quán bar của khách sạn có thể thú vị như một đêm đi chơi với những người đồng hành của quý khách. Quý khách có thể chọn giao thực phẩm đến tận phòng mình tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An, để ăn uống thuận tiện và dễ dàng. Nếu quý khách thực sự ăn uống kén chọn, quý khách sẽ biết ơn vì Tiện nghi nấu nướng ngoài trời tại chỗ có sẵn ở đây.
Hàng loạt dịch vụ giải trí của khách sạn đảm bảo quý khách có nhiều việc để làm trong thời gian quý khách ở lại đây. Kết thúc những ngày trong kỳ nghỉ của quý khách đúng điệu bằng cách ghé vào tiệm làm đẹp, mát-xa, xông khô, bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông ướt và spa.
Các dịch vụ tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An đảm bảo quý khách luôn có thể tham gia nhiều hoạt động trong thời gian lưu trú. Và không có kỳ nghỉ nào kết thúc một cách hoàn hảo nếu quý khách không dành thời gian thư giãn tại bể bơi. Quầy bar bên bể bơi của khách sạn cho phép quý khách thưởng thức khoảng thời gian uống cocktail bình dị nhất với món đồ uống dịu ngọt. Với những người không thích bỏ lỡ buổi tập luyện nào, một chuyến đi tới trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn sẽ giúp quý khách luôn sảng khoái và khỏe mạnh.

tags.tag: Tiện ích tại cơ sở lưu trú

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn nói chung rất sạch sẽ và dịch vụ thật sự tốt. Đặc biệt lòng tốt và sự chu đáo của nhân viên để lại ấn tượng mạnh nhất trong tôi. Koi, người điều hành xe đưa đón, Gigi ở quầy thông tin, và nhân viên V ở nhà hàng đã gây ấn tượng đặc biệt. Nhờ sự phục vụ thân thiện của họ, tôi có thể cảm thấy thoải mái trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Bữa sáng cũng rất hài lòng. Có nhiều món ăn và trái cây khác nhau được chuẩn bị, và hương vị cũng rất tuyệt vời. Phòng khách cũng sạch sẽ, và tình trạng bộ lọc vòi sen cũng sạch sẽ, khiến tôi càng yên tâm khi sử dụng. Khách sạn cách Phố Cổ khoảng 10 phút đi xe, nhưng có xe đưa đón nên không gặp bất tiện gì trong việc di chuyển. Thực tế, đây là một nơi không đông đúc và yên tĩnh hơn, điều đó thật tốt. Hồ bơi có ở cả tầng 1 và tầng 7, vì vậy tôi đã có thể sử dụng một cách thoải mái. Nếu có cơ hội quay lại Hội An, tôi muốn ở lại khách sạn này một lần nữa. Tôi xin giới thiệu khách sạn Grand Sunrise Palace.

Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Sang trọng, dịch vụ tốt, tận tình với khách, bạn Anna tiếp tân rất dễ thương và thân thiện

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn khá gần biển, thuận lợi di chuyển. Khách sạn đầy đủ tiện nghi (hồ bơi, gym, spa), phòng lưu trú sạch sẽ, rộng rãi, phong cách thiết kế đặc trưng khá ấn tượng, có bánh và nước welcome. Chỗ đỗ xe ô tô rộng rãi, tiện lợi. Recommended!

Nhân viên cực kì nhiệt tình, nhất là 2 bạn Amy và Jay luôn hỏi han và chuẩn bị chu đáo.
Phòng sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, decor thân thiện; đồ ăn sáng nhiều và ngon; vị trí thuận lợi, cách phố cổ 10 phút xe máy.

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: The wellness of the staff ,hotel employee was so helpful and supportive with all we needed

sample_comments.text:
初めてのホイアンでしたが、素晴らしい滞在になりました。
ホイアンの街は古く、チャーミングで、夕方から夜にかけてランタンに火が灯り始めると、とても幻想的な雰囲気になります。
その思い出は快適なホテルステイによって、よりいいものになりました。
ロケーションは旧市街地から少し離れてますが、送迎のバスやレンタルの自転車で問題はありません。むしろ自転車で街並みを走ることは快適で気持ちのいい体験でした。
ホテルは内装や調度品など、クラシカルで凝っていて、さらに清潔に保たれていました。風呂場のタイルや水道の蛇口に至るまで、こんなに完璧に設計されたホテルは見たことがありません。
さらにホテルスタッフは親切で高いホスピタリティを持っています。特にレセプションでお会いしたLunaさんは、ステイ中に知っておくべきこを教えてくれ、こちらの要望にも素早く対応してくれました。その後何度かホテル内で顔を合わせた時も、必ず笑顔で手を振ってくれて、さらに気持ちのいいホテル滞在にしてくれました。ありがとう！
次にホイアンに来ることがあれば、また滞在します。
sample_comments.title: ホイアンの思い出とほす

sample_comments.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, thân thiện. Bữa ăn sáng nhiều món, ngon

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Excellent services from all staffs. The food was great. We all loved thefood & especially the pho soup from Chef Tro?ng. We will stay here again next time we?re in Hoi An

sample_comments.text:
Về phòng
Rất đẹp và thoải mái. Chỉ có một chút bất tiện là không gian lưu trữ quanh bàn rửa mặt hơi ít và vị trí mắc áo trong tủ quần áo cao, nhưng nhìn chung thì phòng rất sạch sẽ, rộng rãi và dễ sử dụng. Nước cũng được bổ sung hàng ngày.

Về dịch vụ
Thật tuyệt vời. Đặc biệt là cảm ơn chị Tiffany đã giúp đỡ tôi rất nhiều. Dường như tôi có thể tư vấn đặt xe đưa đón và spa qua WhatsApp, nhưng tôi đã gặp khó khăn trong việc đăng nhập vào WhatsApp, và chị Tiffany đã hướng dẫn tôi rằng có thể hỗ trợ qua LINE. Chị đã hỗ trợ tôi đặt xe đưa đón sân bay và spa qua chat, cũng như đã gửi hình ảnh địa điểm tập trung cho xe bus trở về, và khi tôi gặp một số vấn đề, chị đã gọi điện qua LINE để hỗ trợ tôi, mang lại dịch vụ gần gũi và chu đáo.

Bữa sáng có nhiều loại và dịch vụ phòng cũng hợp lý. Có nhiều ưu đãi cho khách lưu trú dài ngày, vì vậy tôi rất khuyến khích bạn nên ở lại nhiều ngày!

sample_comments.title: Hyped Scores, Disappointing Reality
sample_comments.positives: The room was really good --- nicely decorated, spacious, and with excellent air conditioning. The only odd detail was the glass wall between the shower and toilet: it was completely see-through rather than opaque, which felt a bit bizarre.
sample_comments.negatives: This is not a 5-star establishment. Service & Standards: We booked a pickup transfer but it wasn't provided. No welcome water or cold towel on arrival --- not essential, but expected from a true 5 property. Staff presence around the pool felt unprofessional: either slouched on phones with loud volume or staring uncomfortably at guests. Basic corporate training is badly needed. Doormen/security often failed to open doors, and shockingly, one was seen using a neighboring property as a toilet --- absolutely unacceptable. Facilities: Both the ground floor and rooftop pool areas were cramped and unappealing. Towels were tired, stained, and always in short supply; at one point, a pile of used towels sat near the main reception. Cigar smoke came through the bathroom ventilation and into hallways, raising fire safety concerns. Rooms: Spacious and decently decorated, but furniture was of poor quality (wobbly, peeling). Definitely not 5 standard. Spa: Treatments were good, though reception was overly pushy about upselling services. Atmosphere & Design: Decor felt tacky, dominated by plastic flowers. Not a luxury feel.Overall: Not worth the money. The hotel lacks the service, standards, and vision of a 5-star experience.

sample_comments.title: Unprofessional staff
sample_comments.text: Unprofessional staff. Harassed us on a technical issue which was later proven to be agoda website issue.

sample_comments.title: Overall the hotel is new and nice but a little inconsistent in some of the details.
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast is very good, lots of variety and fresh fruit and pastries and vegetarian options, however on one morning the coffee was quite burnt and the staff won't give you a espresso machine coffee for free, they charge for those. Staff very nice, the hotel is new and clean and quite beautiful. Pools kept cold and refreshing. Location is good if you want to be a bit outside of all the action in the main part of Hoi An, but you can bike there or to the beach or use the hotel shuttle.
sample_comments.negatives: Overall, the hotel is good, however a bit inconsistent. The breakfasts were great but order off the menu for lunch or dinner at your peril, some of the food was okay but some was inedible. A bit stingy with the drinking water for one of the more upscale hotels in the area. Beds are not comfortable unless you like a hard mattress. Bathrooms are basically in the room with only a curtain for a door, which is a choice. Very little privacy as the staff will be all over you from the minute you get there until you leave. Rooms are advertised as having a balcony but it's not a usable balcony with table and chairs, rather a standing-room-only place where you can enjoy the view. Also, we originally booked a room with two beds and at some point our booking got changed to a suite with a queen bed, and when we arrived and said we preferred the twin room, we were still charged for the suite.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text:
We picked this hotel mainly because of its extremely high Agoda ratings and the surprisingly affordable price for a supposedly 5-star property. Unfortunately, our experience ended up being quite disappointing overall.

Starting with the positives, the customer service was definitely the hotel's strongest point. The staff were warm, polite, and genuinely eager to serve us and ensure our needs were attended to. Their hospitality and attitude were commendable.

That said, communication could sometimes be frustrating, likely due to language barriers. Despite making my requests as simple and direct as possible, some things were repeatedly not carried out. For example, the staff advised us to request the sauna be turned on around 30 minutes before use. I made the request twice in advance on the first occasion just to make sure, yet it still was not done and no apology was given. The same thing happened again the next day, and it was only on the third day that the process finally went smoothly.

I only used the rooftop pool, which itself was quite nice, and it was a bonus that the hotel offers two pools to choose from. However, the chlorine levels felt excessively high --- after only about 10 minutes of swimming, both my skin and the inside of my mouth were stinging.

Breakfast was decent but heavily lacked non-pork options, which was disappointing as we do not eat pork. It genuinely felt like almost everything contained pork. The standout item for us was the beef pho, which was excellent, but unfortunately it was only available on the first day and replaced with another pork-based noodle dish the following day.

The gym was honestly in very poor condition. For cardio, only the bicycle seemed functional while most of the other equipment was not working properly.

Another thing we personally found uncomfortable was the checkout experience. While we appreciated being asked whether we had encountered any issues during our stay, we found it inappropriate to then receive a small gift alongside a request implying we should avoid posting complaints in reviews. We strongly believe guests should be free to share their honest experiences so businesses can improve constructively. Rankings and popularity should grow organically so future guests know what to realistically expect.

Despite the negatives, there were still aspects of the stay we genuinely enjoyed. The bed was extremely comfortable, the water pressure was excellent, cleanliness standards were good, and the spa experience was wonderful.

sample_comments.title: Great room but overall not a great experience
sample_comments.text:
The hotel was nice in appearance but our experience did not meet our expectations for a 5 star hotel.
When we arrived, I ordered a coffee that according to the menu on the table was half price from what I was charged. 
While taking a shower, I found a gum stuck in the shampoo shelve. The room had an amazing bathtub but not a large enough boiler to take a bath; water was barely sufficient for two persons taking a quick shower.
The staff was nice except for the lady that seemed as a manager. We hired laundry service from a local business and she quite rudely informed us that the hotel provides this service, around 10 times more expensive though!

Grand Sunrise Palace team

sample_comments.title: Mixed feeling.
sample_comments.text:
Review: Grand Sunrise

We stayed at Grand Sunrise and found the experience to be a mix of positives and negatives.

Room:
The room was spacious and had everything we needed. The decor was nice, with a unique feature of a bathtub placed in the middle of the room. However, the choice of black wooden furniture makes all marks and scratches highly visible, which detracts from the otherwise clean appearance.

Facilities:
The tropical-style pool was a lovely touch --- shaded most of the day, not crowded, and a relaxing place to unwind. Breakfast was varied, with plenty of options ranging from local Vietnamese dishes to Western choices, which we appreciated.

Service & Cleanliness:
Unfortunately, our experience was let down by some serious issues. One evening, we returned to our room to find a cockroach --- certainly not what you'd expect in a hotel of this level. When we informed reception, their response was underwhelming; a simple "sorry" without any real concern or follow-up. This lack of response was disappointing.

Noise:
Sound insulation was very poor. We could hear everything from the adjacent rooms, and one night we were kept awake by a loud argument in the room above us --- it honestly felt like it was happening inside our room.

Afternoon Tea:
The "complimentary afternoon tea" was a letdown. The sandwiches were unappealing and filled with questionable fillings, the desserts had an odd rubbery texture, and the tea options were limited to black or green. Honestly, it would be better not to offer this at all, or at least rename it to something like a "Vietnamese snack hour" to avoid misleading expectations, especially from international guests.

Location:
The hotel is about a 30-minute walk to both the Old Quarter and the beach. Manageable, but not particularly convenient if you plan to explore on foot frequently.

Overall:
Overall, the hotel is passable --- perhaps comparable to a decent travelodge --- but it doesn't live up to the standards one might expect from the name or photos. It's fine if you're looking for a basic stay and don't mind the drawbacks, but don't come with high expectations.

An update is:
After posting my initial review, I was contacted by one of the hotel managers who was very apologetic and genuinely eager to make things right. The room has since been disinfected, and although I wasn't expecting any compensation, I was offered a partial refund---which I truly appreciated. It clearly shows that the hotel management takes guest feedback and their reputation seriously. After such thoughtful follow-up, I'll definitely consider staying here again, even just to see how things have improved.

sample_comments.title: Kathy and Luna are the BEST!!!
sample_comments.text:
We are beyond impressed by the out of the worldly hospitality during our stay ! Kathy from guest relations and Luna from reception took really good care of us. They truly made our stay in Hoi An memorable.

We travel 3-4 times annually and we have stayed in many top class hotels before, from five star resorts in Santorini, world renowned heritage hotels in metropolitans, to top class private onsen villas in Japan, with professional staff members and excellent five star service- but none of them can compare with the hospitality we have experienced here at the Grand Sunrise Palace Hotel. The service we experienced here was really next level. 

Luna from reception gave us the warmest welcome as we checked in to the hotel. She took the time to understand our interests and gave tailored suggestions for our trip. Throughout the week she would always greet us by our first name with the biggest smile on her face. One time we overslept and skipped the breakfast buffet, she noticed and asked if we were ok when she saw us. When we were heading out, she immediately asked if we needed any towels once she learned that we were going to the beach. Warm, loving and caring, her friendliness and attention to details brightened us up every day. 

Kathy from guest relations truly took the hospitality game to the next level, and we are beyond impressed ! She took the time to get to know us, and planned wonderful trips tailored for our interests and taste. The most heartwarming thing is how she genuinely wants the best for you, and would go all the way out to make sure you have the best experience during your stay. 

One day we found an uncommon local experience online but we had trouble booking due to language barrier. There were a lot of details to discuss with the host. Kathy actually took the time to call the host to arrange the trip for us after she got off work. After a full day of back and forth communication, the host eventually rejected our booking due to short-staffed. At that time we had already given up on the experience. Just when we gave up hope, Kathy said "Never give up !" and showed us four different new hosts. She had researched all night for alternatives during her time off. "I just want the customers I take care of to not have any regrets. If you have an incomplete vacation, I will also feel very uncomfortable." Kathy said. We were really touched by her thoughtful acts.

So Kathy proceeded to help us communicate with the new host, arranging everything down to the details of our very strict dietary needs, and we had the most memorable experience we would treasure for life.

There are so many reasons to love this hotel, including sweet little details like how the security guards would take pictures of the license plate numbers of all the cars we got on and off, and how we would receive a daily hand written card by housekeeping about the weather of the day. Facilities are new and clean. We will definitely come back. The vibe is really good here. 

But above all, we are truly impressed by the genuine, warm, loving and caring staff members who made us feel at home. How we wish that every hotel in the world got staff members like Kathy and Luna!

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Our stay here was lovely and very comfortable. From the moment we arrived, the staff and security guard were incredibly friendly and welcoming, creating such a pleasant atmosphere. The lobby was cool and inviting with amazing air conditioning and great music that made it such a relaxing space to come back to after exploring. The outside of the building is beautiful as well, with a lovely water fountain out front that adds to the charm.

The restaurant and breakfast were both excellent --- everything we tried was fresh and flavorful. The smoothies at breakfast were delicious, and I definitely recommend ordering the limeade --- it was so refreshing and easily one of the best drinks we had during our trip! The food overall was fantastic, with a great variety to choose from, and the desserts were just as good as the main dishes. The piña coladas were also fantastic --- cold, fruity, and perfectly made. The restaurant musician was so sweet and added such a wonderful touch to the evenings.

The spa was absolutely amazing and well worth the money --- one of the most relaxing experiences we had on our trip. The rooms were quiet, comfortable, and very clean, and we appreciated the thoughtful welcome dessert tray waiting for us when we arrived.
sample_comments.negatives:
The bathroom setup was a bit unique in design, but it worked fine for us.

The only thing that could be improved is the shuttle service --- it doesn't run very often, so we mostly relied on Grab to get into town. That said, it's not a far drive, and everything else more than made up for that small inconvenience. 

Overall, we had a wonderful stay and truly appreciated the kindness of the staff, the beautiful atmosphere, and all the thoughtful touches that made our time here so enjoyable.

sample_comments.text:
The staff, rooms, breakfast and lobby was exceptional. Lucy was a great host and made sure that I felt welcomed. I think this is a very nice hotel for couples. As a solo traveler it was a bit over the top. The sauna was amazing, however if you are looking for a gym, you might be disappointed as the equipment was subpar and not well maintained.

Apart from that everything was great and location wise it's 5 mins taxi ride to old town which is very convenient. There are some good Spas also outside which I would recommend. I had a foot massage at the hotel, was okey for the price but nothing extra ordinary.

Overall I'd say that I would come back but preferably with a partner.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Stayed at Grand Sunrise Palace for 8 nights and had an unforgettable experience. The staff was incredibly attentive, always available to assist with bookings or offer helpful recommendations.

A special thank you to Kathy, Amy, and Jessi for taking such wonderful care of us. The hotel features a spa with a range of treatments, including massages and facials, along with a sauna, steam room, and cold water jacuzzi. The massages were outstanding, and I'd like to give a special thanks to Tina and Sam.

Breakfast was also a highlight, offering a great variety of both Western and Asian dishes. There were stations where omelets or scrambled eggs were prepared, alongside pho and cau lau.

I was also impressed with the room, which was clean and well-maintained throughout our stay. The bed was comfortable, making for restful nights. My only minor critique would be that there wasn't enough hot water to fill the bathtub, but this didn't detract from an otherwise fantastic experience.

A huge thank you to all the amazing staff for making our stay so memorable!

sample_comments.title: Second time staying
sample_comments.text:
Stayed for 4 nights

Pros: 
-friendly and helpful staffs in lobby area. Special mention to Jessi and Luna. These girls will answer any query you have. 
-Rooms are gorgeous and spacious but don't recommend 3 adults in a deluxe double room. We had many luggage and it was difficult to move around freely
-There is a market and many shops closeby. Old town is about 10mins drive. Hotel provides a free shuttle to old town and beach but it has a timetable so plan your trip accordingly. Unfortunately our timings never aligned
-Barista coffee is free in breakfast. 
-Free cold water jacuzzi/ sauna to use. Use Google Translate when communicating with the ladies at spa as its hard to comprehend 
- Tasty welcome drink+snacks, 
-good water pressure in bathroom 

Cons: Housekeeping is quite slow. If you call and request for something it will take time to come. I've stayed in 4* hotels which has faster service despite being full
-Hard to communicate with spa staffs as they have limited English. Make sure use google translate when booking for jacuzzi/sauna. 
-Restaurant service and food is average . I have been to 4 star hotels which has better menu and service. Staffs are quite slow in clearing the tables and filling up. Menu is mostly non-veg and oriental cuisine. Not suitable for Indians. They do have separate vegan menu but it will get repetitive if you're staying for a week. Unfortunately they only have pastries for desserts and nothing local. It would have been great if they included local sweets or desserts too. 

Overall: this is my 2nd time staying at Grand Sunrise, however first one felt more special and overall service more relevant for a 5 star. This time it lagged in many areas and we were not treated the same as first time. Maybe cause we were returning guests so not much attention was paid. Not sure what it was but there was a difference between the first and second stay.

sample_comments.title: The staff make it truly a Grand Stay
sample_comments.positives:
Great property in Hoi An, about 2kms from Old Town but the hotel does have shuttles which you can use to head to Old Town if you do not want to walk.

The facilities at the hotel were really great we tried the spa - where the experience was one of the best I have had.

The room itself was well designed and comfortable and had a nice balcony view of Hoi An.

The staff were very attentive especially Jessi and Kathy who were very accommodating to our requests and easy to contact.
sample_comments.negatives: If I do have to point something out it will be only to prepare in advance the rooms allocated carries the amenities for the number of people on the booking, of course you can easily call housekeeping and get this done but as I said if I were to be super picky about something...will definitely rebook if we visit Hoi An again

sample_comments.positives:
For the price, location, food and benefits = fantastic.

The location was great and a 7 minute bike ride to the old quarters with their free bike rental!

Was easy and safe to get around, far enough away from the old quarters but close enough too. Beds and pillows comfortable, spa in the lower level in the hotel was the best we went to in all of Vietnam with great prices.

Pools, room and breakfast were great! And staff were so accommodating. I had food poisoning 30 minutes prior to a tour and they quickly got me ginger tea for the ride and tried their best to accomodate. 

Also, lots of benefits for longer stays! 

If you're deciding between da nang or Hoi an, Hoi an is a quieter town and less lively but very peaceful and only a 40 minute drive from the da nang airport!
sample_comments.negatives:
Our room faced the main road so was a bit loud in the morning. However, we were quickly moved with assistance when they were made aware of the situation.

The further away the room is from the elevators, the worse the wifi.

The A/C stays turned off in the dining area even if you go there to eat. We tried to have lunch one day at the hotel and it was so hot. However, no one really stays there for lunch so we understood.

But cannot think of any real big complaints. These were all minor and fixed fast!!

sample_comments.title: A Good Hotel to stay
sample_comments.text:
My family and I had a very happy stay at Grand Sunrise Palacn Hoi An. The staff were incredibly helpful and friendly. Whenever I had any issues, they assisted me immediately and resolved everything very quickly.
The breakfast spread was also excellent, with good quality food and a wide variety of choices to choose from.
Overall, it was a pleasant and comfortable stay, and I would gladly recommend this hotel to others visiting Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: We stayed here for 2 days. The hotel was really nice and well maintained. But the best part of the hotel was the staff. Lily was an exceptional standout as she helped us reschedule our flight at VietJet by going above and beyond by speaking with the customer support team for 30 mins. We really appreciate her efforts :)

sample_comments.title: Great Value for Money
sample_comments.text: Room was very luxurious and clean. Breakfast spread was also very good. Pools seems to be underutilized but added to the nice ambience of the location. Staff were exceptionally friendly, especially Jessi who catered to all our needs and transportation to and fro Hoi An Ancient Town. There were also free bicycles that you can ride around whch I highly recommend.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The room was amazing and the whole hotel was spotless and really nicely decorated. The staff were very nice and helpful.
sample_comments.negatives:
Food was good but not amazing.

The hotel really lacked atmosphere while we were there because there weren't many people staying. Some music around the pool would have improved things.

sample_comments.title: Great Stay
sample_comments.text: The hotel was fantastic! From the attentive staff to the seamless service, every detail was handled with care. The restaurant environment was lovely, and the breakfast spread was impressive. The room was also spotless and very comfortable. I will definitely be returning!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jardian,
Thank you very much for your wonderful review.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and appreciated our attentive staff, seamless service, comfortable room, and breakfast selection. It's also great to know you enjoyed the restaurant atmosphere.
We truly appreciate your feedback and look forward to welcoming you back again in the future.

sample_comments.title: Would definitely stay again
sample_comments.positives: We enjoyed the hospitality as well as the modern and clean room. The food at the restaurant was great as well. We received airport pick up which was great. We requested a stop before arriving at the hotel for.check in and that was convenient.
sample_comments.negatives:
It would have been nice to be on a higher floor. There wasn't much of a view. 

Also we asked for transportation to the airport the day of checkout and our driver hit a woman on a motorbike on our way to the airport. This was extremely unsettling and traumatizing!

sample_comments.title: Lovely boutique hotel
sample_comments.text:
We had a lovely stay at this boutique hotel in Hội An. The hotel offers a convenient shuttle service to both the Old Town and the beach, which are already quite close, making getting around very easy. It is worth noting that there are laundry services, shops and local restaurants all next to the hotel 

The rooms are spacious and comfortable. As we were traveling with infants, we did run into a couple of minor issues---such as needing extra towels that were later removed---but once we mentioned it, the staff resolved everything promptly.

We also requested additional bottled water due to preparing feeds for our babies, but there was a set limit per room. This wasn't a major problem as we were able to purchase more nearby, though it's worth noting as other hotels we've stayed at have been more flexible with this.

The staff are incredibly warm and attentive, and they were especially lovely with our babies, which we really appreciated.

A special highlight was the hotel spa---the massages are absolutely amazing and very affordable. I ended up having four during our stay and could easily have had one every day! 

The gym is extremely dated but you can make some things work 

A special mention goes to Koi, who truly made a difference to our experience. He was friendly, polite, and went above and beyond with helpful recommendations and assistance throughout our stay. He's a real credit to the team.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Excellent hotel. The rooms are nice and spacious, the breakfast is wonderful with great variety, and the staff was exceptional. Vu, who works at reception and the restaurant was very kind and helpful, and Tina from the SPA is a superb massage therapist. Would gladly come back to this hotel.

sample_comments.title: A signature experience
sample_comments.text: The Signature Suite adds another level to the appeal of Grand Sunrise Palace. Great staff, with Ella, our hostess, being indeed amazing. Excellent restaurant on the premises, lots of convenient small stores around. A bit far from the Old City but they offer a shuttle and Grab is very convenient.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Excellent service and room property! Would definitely come back next time in Hoi An

sample_comments.title: A little gem in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Very nice hotel, with local color and great staff. Ella, our hostess, was indeed amazing. Excellent restaurant on the premises, lots of convenient small stores around. A bit far from the Old City but they offer a shuttle and Grab is very convenient.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The room was a good size and quite modern. The breakfast was great and the staff were super friendly and helpful. The bikes were very useful.
sample_comments.negatives: The layout of the room is a little odd. But not much to not like about this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Great hoi an hotel
sample_comments.text: This young hotel 2.5 years old was designed with French indochine style is really a gem worthy stay with its luxurious size room and open bathtub and great breakfast spread with its huge range of juices and daily change of local cuisine. The hotel also provides free shuttle to the old town. A special mention to Ame and Ella for their outstanding hospitality and super friendliness during our two night stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kim,
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your wonderful review! We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and appreciated the French Indochine-style design, spacious room, open bathtub, and our breakfast selection. Your kind words about our free shuttle to the old town and especially the outstanding hospitality and friendliness shown by Ame and Ella mean a lot to our team. We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back again soon!

sample_comments.title: Very enjoyable stay, I would go back!
sample_comments.positives: Clean and updated. Staff was friendly and helpful
sample_comments.negatives: Gym was in the basement

sample_comments.title: Hoi An Visit
sample_comments.text: This is a good hotel located outside of Hoi An Old Town so a little quieter. The room is decent size but clean. The bathroom area is very tiny, there is no place to put my personal toiletries, and no place to hang the wet towels after showers. The breakfast is very good with both western and Asian options. The staff is very friendly and provide great services when asked.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Chih, 
Thank you for sharing your feedback! We're glad you enjoyed our quiet location, clean and comfortable room, and delicious breakfast. We also appreciate your comments about the bathroom layout and will take them into consideration as we continue to improve. We hope to welcome you back again soon!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: What a lovely hotel! From the staff to the room to the services - everything exceeded my expectations! This was definitely the most premium hotel that I stayed at as a solo traveler that tends to stick to homestays/hostels/budget hotels, so this place was a welcome treat. The staff were incredibly helpful and accommodating of my needs, the spa services were definitely worth it, and love the amenities of breakfast and shuttle services!

sample_comments.title: Lovely stay and lovely staff
sample_comments.text: We had a lovely stay at this hotel during our time in Hoi An. The staff were so friendly and helpful. The rooms were lovely too. Would reccomend staying here
sample_comments.response:
Dear Lucy,
Thank you very much for your kind review. We're delighted to hear that you had a lovely stay and enjoyed our friendly staff and comfortable rooms. Thank you for your recommendation, and we hope to welcome you back again soon.

sample_comments.title: A+++ hotel. Wonderful rooms, amazing breakfast but most importantly the staff is amazing...
sample_comments.positives: This hotel was special; The room, the breakfast, the amenities were all top notch; we loved it . What made this hotel special was the staff. Ame, Kathy, the security, everyone - it was like family. They were so friendly. I would absolutely stay here again and hope to soon!
sample_comments.negatives: that I didn't stay longer. I loved this hotel. I wish I could have stayed a few more days .

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
This hotel exceeded expectations! Friendly staff ,spotless room, comfortable bed, good location, and a delicious breakfast .
From check-in to check-out, GRO Luna provided top-notch service. Her personal touch, from making arrangements for our Spa , afternoon tea and ensuring our every need was met, made this our most comfortable visit .
We'll definitely be back if we ever visit HoiAn again .

sample_comments.title: Birthday Getaway
sample_comments.positives: Koi showed remarkable kindness and attentiveness when picking me up from the airport, making me feel genuinely welcomed and cared for from the very beginning. Ame and Kathy's warmth, kindness, and helpfulness as Customer Service Officers truly touched me. Mr. Dat and his security team always greeted me with a warm smile, whether I was arriving or departing, which made me feel truly valued and appreciated. At the spa, Cam's massages were expertly tailored, with just the right amount of pressure to convey care and concern for my comfort. Oanh and Stella consistently made me feel genuinely welcome whenever I stepped into the spa, creating a soothing and compassionate atmosphere that helped me unwind. The wait staff and kitchen staff were always attentive and dedicated, providing exceptional service with heartfelt care. Lastly, the housekeeping team did an outstanding job maintaining my room, and the turn-down service was always thoughtful and comforting.
sample_comments.negatives: Having to leave

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Good service with free shuttle bus to Old town n beach. Breakfast was good. Hotel manager Ame is very helpful.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Tang,
Thank you very much for your kind review. We're pleased to hear that you enjoyed our good service, the free shuttle bus to the Old Town and the beach, as well as our breakfast. We truly appreciate your kind words about our Hotel Manager, Ame, and will be sure to share your compliments with her. We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

sample_comments.title: Birthday Trip
sample_comments.positives: Koi was incredibly friendly and attentive when picking me up from the airport, making me feel welcomed right from the start. Ame and Kathy's kindness and helpfulness as Customer Service Officers truly stood out. Mr. Dat and his security team always greeted me with a warm smile, whether I was arriving or departing, which made me feel valued. At the spa, Cam's massages were expertly tailored, with just the right amount of pressure that left me feeling cared for. Oanh and Stella consistently made me feel truly welcome whenever I stepped into the spa, creating a comforting and relaxing atmosphere.
sample_comments.negatives: That I had to leave.

sample_comments.title: End of year holiday
sample_comments.text: Great hotel with very friendly staff. Hotel amenities could be better and breakfast options was repetitive specially we stayed for 5 days. Jaye and Ame at the front desk was very helpful. Stella, MY and another lady at the spa were great and professional. I went with my wife 2 days in a row. Definitely will recommend.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Davissen,
Thank you very much for your detailed feedback and recommendation. We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and found our staff---especially Jaye, Ame, Stella, MY, and the spa team---friendly, helpful, and professional. We appreciate your comments regarding the hotel amenities and breakfast options and will take them into consideration to improve our services. We truly look forward to welcoming you and your wife back again soon!

sample_comments.title: It was amazing from top to bottom. Loved every moment. The food was amazing. The room service and the buffet. The pool.
sample_comments.positives: It's was beautifully decorated and everything worked.
sample_comments.negatives: People smoked too close to outside near the front entrance. I would prefer them to smoke further away from front entrance so smoke doesn't blow into the building.

sample_comments.title: Amazing staff
sample_comments.text: Luna and the dryer we especially friendly and helpful. They would go the extra mile to address your concerns. Very delightful to the them of r wonderful staff. If hotel could provide liquid hand soap instead would be better. If you like the quieter part of Hoi an, this is the place for you!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mel,
Thank you very much for your kind and detailed feedback. We're delighted to hear that Luna and the team made your stay so enjoyable with their friendliness and helpfulness. We appreciate your suggestion regarding liquid hand soap and will take it into consideration. It's wonderful to know you enjoyed our peaceful location in Hoi An, and we look forward to welcoming you back soon!

sample_comments.title: Good Staff: Ella and Suly
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is very good and Ella is very friendly!

sample_comments.title: Excellent comfortable stay
sample_comments.text: Away from the hustle bustle of the Old Town, yet close enough by shuttle / Grab, Grand Sunrise Palace Hoi A was a delightful stay for us as a family traveling with an elderly and a child. Breakfast spread and quality was great. We enjoyed the complimentary access to the sauna and steamroom. The foot massages were reasonably priced and a great experience. The airport transfer arranged by the hotel was professional and comfortable. We enjoyed complimentary afternoon tea service during our stay. Overall, highly recommend for a comfortable stay in Hoi An. Ella and Ame at the front reception were excellent in engaging visitors and helpful.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Li,
Thank you very much for your detailed and wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that you and your family had a comfortable stay with us and enjoyed our breakfast, sauna and steam room, foot massages, afternoon tea, and airport transfer. It's also great to know that Ella and Ame provided excellent service at the front desk. Your kind recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back to Grand Sunrise Palace Hoi An in the future!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: We had an amazing time at Grand Sunrise Palace. Ame met us at check in and took care of every question, concern, idea we had, even some we didn't think about ahead of time! Everyone on the staff was responsive and caring. The breakfast buffet had a great variety of foods and drinks. The pools were cool and calming. We had fun with Tom at the cooking class. Koi was our driver to and from the airport and was funny and informative. We will stay again.

sample_comments.title: great hotel
sample_comments.text:
Front desk staff Amy was fantastic --- from the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed with towels and welcome drinks. Her friendliness and attentiveness made check-in smooth and pleasant.

The highlight of the stay has to be their breakfast --- absolutely incredible and delicious! The variety, taste and freshness were truly impressive, and it definitely exceeded our expectations.

One minor downside is that the afternoon tea is only available for guests staying for two consecutive nights, which is a little disappointing. However, overall the experience was still very enjoyable and we left satisfied.

Would love to come back again!

sample_comments.title: Perfection!
sample_comments.positives:
Our stay at the Grand Sunrise Palace in Hoi An was truly memorable from start to finish. The property itself is beautiful---clean, thoughtfully designed, and perfectly situated for both relaxation and exploring the area.

What made the experience stand out most, though, was the level of care and attention from the staff. Ame and Tiffany, in particular, went above and beyond to make sure we felt welcomed and taken care of throughout our stay. Their kindness, professionalism, and genuine warmth didn't go unnoticed---they added a personal touch that made everything feel effortless and special.

Whether it was helping with recommendations, ensuring our comfort, or simply greeting us with a smile, the team created an atmosphere that felt both elevated and deeply welcoming. 

I would absolutely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Hoi An and would gladly stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Nice boutique hotel
sample_comments.text: The room is beautifully designed. I like the decor . We were welcomed by hotel staff Lily who walked us up to our room and explained to us the room facilities. There was also a tray of welcome cakes in the room. The next day, we were greeted by Lily again when adjoining for breakfast . The breakfast selection was great and coffee is so good.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Extremely friendly staff. Room was great and spacious. Breakfast was great. Location is a bit further out but we liked that because it was a nice escape from the bustle of old town.
sample_comments.negatives: The pool areas are a bit worn compared to the photos but we still enjoyed them. They were painting the rooftop while we were there which added a foul odor while relaxing by the pool but that's life!

sample_comments.title: Awesome stay with great hospitality
sample_comments.text: Very clean and classy room. Great service with staff Luna. Very friendly staff with excellent breakfast spread and quality.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The staff were very friendly and helpful. The room was spacious and very clean, and the facilities were quite new. The breakfast was delicious, with a wide variety of options. We borrowed bikes to explore the area, and it was a great experience spending time riding through the countryside. We enjoyed our two-night stay and would definitely stay at this hotel again if we visit the area. I would especially like to mention our main host, Ame, who welcomed us on arrival and demonstrated excellent professionalism and hospitality.
sample_comments.negatives: None

sample_comments.title: Recommended
sample_comments.text: Beautiful hotel, free bike rental available which was the perfect way to move around the city. In the rooms facing the street expect some noise from the traffic. Excellent staff, a special thanks to Ame who took great care of us.

sample_comments.title: We loved our stay at the Grand Sunrise
sample_comments.positives: My wife and I enjoyed our stay at the Grand Sunrise immensely. Our guest services representative, Ame, was lovely and very helpful. Our room was beyond our expectations - spacious and comfortable. My wife loved the large bathtub in our room. She also took advantage of the spa service onsite. The location was great as well. It was away from the hustle and bustle of the Old Town, but just a quick Grab ride away. Plus guests could use their bicycles to ride to the rice fields which were very close by. If we go back to Hoi An, we'll definitely plan to stay at the Grand Sunrise.
sample_comments.negatives: The only negative was that the counter space around the bathroom sink was very limited, so there was not much room for toothbrushes, toothpaste, etc.

sample_comments.title: 5star hotel
sample_comments.text: Wir haben drei Nächte hier verbracht und können sagen, dass es ein sehr gutes Hotel ist, mit sehr gutem Frühstück und auch netter Idee mit dem afternoon tea. Unsere Betreuerin Ame ist sehr nett und hat uns viel erklärt. Danke dafür. Der Whirlpool und die Sauna sind nicht der Rede wert, aber dafür ist hoi an auch nicht bekannt. Der Pool am Dach ist dafür umso besser.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Extremely satisfied stay. Jay and Ame are really friendly staff. Highly recommended!

sample_comments.title: awesome hotel
sample_comments.text: thanks Ella Kathy. you are the best

sample_comments.title: Best vacation we have ever had! Staff, facility, food..10++
sample_comments.positives: Everything about Sunrise Palace was beyond our expectations. Great customer service, amazing facility, and breakfasts 10+. Shout out to the staff..they were always looking for ways to make our stay better!!
sample_comments.negatives: nothing

sample_comments.title: Anniversary
sample_comments.text: Fantastic stay here. Staff was amazing especially Jessi. She made our stay even more enjoyable. I asked for her to help decorate the room and they did an amazing job

sample_comments.title: Ame is the best! Very warm Service and. Place Like Home
sample_comments.positives: Location and food are amazing

sample_comments.title: Service was excellent
sample_comments.text: During our stay the staff were fantastic especially Jessi and Kathy. Have gone their way to make us feel at home. Spa were great as well!

sample_comments.title: Grant Sunrise Palace Hoi An is a great hotel with amazing service!
sample_comments.positives:
Wonderful staff - we would personally like to thank our concierge Jay, V from the dining room (who personally delivered our coffees) and Koi, the safest driver in Vietnam! We also had warm welcomes daily from the pool lifeguard, all of the front desk staff and the doormen. 
Great breakfast - there was a full, beautiful buffet daily
Clean, quiet, comfortable room - thank you to the cleaning staff!
sample_comments.negatives: The gym facilities did not match the rest of the property - the treadmill was old and the room in the basement was small and hot. But, we were still thankful to have a gym!

sample_comments.title: Family trip
sample_comments.text:
Excellent service, good location, and nice facilities. Highly recommend

Specially Staff Kathy friendly and helpful.

sample_comments.title: We would definitely recommend the hotel to our friends!
sample_comments.positives: Very clean. Outstanding breakfast. Super friendly staff. Enjoyed drinks by the pool.
sample_comments.negatives: There was a bit of sound transfer between the rooms, but it was minimal.

sample_comments.title: Peaceful location with exceptional hospitality
sample_comments.text:
Located in the quieter part of Hoi An, away from the busy tourist areas. The hotel even provided free shelter services. Since I was on a birthday trip, they surprised me with a cake, which was such a lovely touch.
I also got to enjoy an afternoon tea session (probably because I stayed for 3 nights).
Special shout-out to Jessi, who took great care of us from check-in until the end of our stay, and to Van, who kindly helped us with our bags at checkout. Truly appreciated!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Excellent assistance by Ame and Kathy

sample_comments.title: Pleasant Stay
sample_comments.text: Friendly and helpful staff, and the excellent breakfast. Enjoy the spacious, luxurious rooms, with great facilities (including a gym, sauna, and rooftop pool), and the overall attentive service.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Amie was a great host and very friendly to our young son. Amazing breakfast! One of the best we've had anywhere. Very attentive staff who go way out of their way to help you and all speak great english.
sample_comments.negatives: Bathroom design was a little annoying. One of those things with the see through walls for toilet and shower with a shared sliding door. Why?

sample_comments.title: Incredible value for money
sample_comments.text: We had such an incredible stay with our kids, and parents. The staff, particularly Luna, were so polite, went out of their way and remembered the smaller details to make our stay extra special. Very clean, great food, a short cab to the Hoi An shops... Highly recommend this property!!!

sample_comments.title: We have a wonderful time stayed in your hotel. Thank you!
sample_comments.positives: Yes. The room is very clean, the manage Joe is very helpful. He also found where I lost the money and gave it back to me. We like the hotel very much. Nice staff, delicious breakfast. We will choose this hotel again if we revisit the country. Also we will introduce it to our friends.

sample_comments.title: Loved our stay
sample_comments.text:
We originally booked for 4 nights and extended for the 6 nights in total. Loved the vibe of this hotel. The staff super friendly, huge room with a super king bed. The only improvement they could make is on the f&b - same selection for the buffet breakfast every morning. 
Overall, definitely recommend.

sample_comments.title: Great place to use as a base to explore Hoi An
sample_comments.positives: The hotel was great for our four day stay. Ame and Ella went out of their way to ensure we had all we needed and were very helpful and kind.

sample_comments.title: Perfect Hospitality
sample_comments.text: Really enjoyed my 5 night stay at the Grand Sunrise. The staff are exceptional, a special mention to Suly, Luna and Kathy for making me feel so welcome. The hotel is a 20-25 walk from the old town. Breakfast was tasty. Had two massages which were also very good. Would recommend staying at the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Ame I fall in love regarding the nice hospitality of the women. She was very very kind and funny.

sample_comments.title: Plesant Stay
sample_comments.text: I stayed for one night to celebrate my birthday in Hoi An. My room was deorated nicely with rose petals and hotel treated me a nice birthday cake as well. Jay was the receptionist who given us warm welcome. He is very cheerful, helpful and funny. He made my stay very pleasant. Thank you Jay! ^_^

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: We really enjoyed this hotel. It exceeded our expectations. Staff was exceptional especially Suly in guess relation. This is one of the best hotel we have ever stayed. Full of good surprises.

sample_comments.title: Good service, nice place
sample_comments.text: Highly recommended

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
We loved everything about the hotel. Unbelievable value too. 
The staff were all very friendly, particularly Kathy who was very attentive and genuinely seemed to enjoy her work. 
I highly recommend treating yourself in the spa too.
sample_comments.negatives: It was perfect.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
Lovely stay 
Helpful staff 
Amazing breakfast with lots of vegetarian option which wee requested 
Only little far from the happening cafés and old town where the action is

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Awesome stay. We will be back

sample_comments.title: Great hotel
sample_comments.text: The hotel is beautiful! The food was great. I would stay here again. The only thing we didn't like was it feels like every times we see a staff, it's always a sales pitch of some kind.

sample_comments.title: Amazing hotel, excellent service & facilities, would come back!!
sample_comments.positives:
Best hotel we've stayed in Vietnam! 
The place is beautiful, spa was excellent, we did multiple treatments all were amazing. Service was incredible - especially Jessi and Ame, were super nice and helpful with everything and always making sure everything is good!
Breakfast was seriously exceptional! 
Our room (Indochine suite) was the most beautiful room we've ever stayed in. 
Would come back in a heartbeat.
sample_comments.negatives:
Everything is AMAZING. You cannot go wrong booking this hotel. 
Shuttle/bike/30 min walk from old town.

sample_comments.title: A Very Clean Hotel
sample_comments.text:
I have been to a total of eight hotels since I arrived in Vietnam, and I want to give an honest rating based on a comparison of the 8 hotels I've stayed at in Vietnam.

I booked 5 nights at the Grand Sunrise Palace. The staff showed me the first room, but the view was of many unappealing-looking rooftops and nothing much. I immediately asked to see another room. The second room had no real view either, as thick palm tree branches completely covered it. I stayed in this no-view room for one night. In the meantime, a kind lady named Lilly promised me a new room for the rest of my stay, which made me very happy. The new room had a view of farmlands, houses, and beautiful mountains in the distance. It was peaceful and lovely. I must say that all three rooms I saw were very clean and nicely decorated, which I really appreciated.

As for the service, the female staff helped keep up the hotel's good standard and reputation, but a couple of the male staff fell short.

sample_comments.title: Amazing hotel
sample_comments.positives: Aimi was amazing!
sample_comments.negatives: Loved everything

sample_comments.title: Highly recommended
sample_comments.text:
Very nice hotel with quality products.... the room size and layout were added advantage.. the best was the breakfast with specially catering vegetarian for us. The lady at reception was very helpful and cheerful.. she ensured that our stay was pleasant 

Will visit again

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Ame was great. She was friendly and helpful.The hotel is new and good servuce. The room was amazing. The breakfast was delicous. I highly recommend.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel
sample_comments.text: The hotel is amazing for the price we payed. It's a bit far from the old town, but the hotel offers a free transport service or you can get a grab very easy. The room is amazing and the staff aswell (especially Jessi)

sample_comments.title: Wonderful and relaxing
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was one of the best and there was so many choices. Every staff we met were exceptional and were willing to help. Front desk Lilly was wonderful. Hoping to come back to this wonderful hotel in the future it made our stay memorable.

sample_comments.title: Such a charming place
sample_comments.text:
I loved this hotel, and especially the rooms so much, that we extended our trip and stayed here and additional 3 nights. 
Lovely hotel in a lovely town.

sample_comments.title: Stay here.
sample_comments.positives:
Everything. Luna, Ame and all of the staff were incredible, welcoming and provided exceptional service. 
The rooms are beautifully designed spacious, and the King bed is so comfortable. Spotlessly clean.
Little to no traffic noise or other noise internally from other guests.
The buffet breakfast is excellent! The food menu excellent. We had the fish claypot, the baguette and the chicken Pho. All excellent! 

They have a sauna, steam room and in-house spa services. They have a seperate spa and sauna just for the ladies. Excellent.

They have 2 pools, ground level and Rooftop (including bar with views).
It was 2.2km from the old town, walkable, 25 mins or a 5 min Grab.

You can hire a scooter or lend a hotel bicycle, like we did and ride through neighbouring rice paddy fields, visit the cafe in the fields, jump back if you bike and cycle to the beach.

Can't say enough good things about the hotel. Wonderful experience. Best hotel we have stayed at in Vietnam, so far.
sample_comments.negatives: There's nothing not to like.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Very good assistance from Ame. Good breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional, recommend 10/10
sample_comments.positives: Our stay was wonderful. The rooms and facilities were exceptional, and it truly felt like a five-star hotel experience. The location of the hotel was also great --- halfway between the beach and the Old Town. It was easy to grab a taxi to the Old Town, but it was also an easy walking distance, which we did a few times. The staff were great! Special thanks to Luna for taking such good care of us. Breakfast was also 10/10.

sample_comments.text: Kathy who is the Guest Relations of the hotel has been a tremendous gem. From the day I checked in, she briefed everything about the property and places to visit in Hoi An. Free shuttle bus, bicycles, room upgrades, breakfast, and also a complimentary hi-tea. Including the Spa promo. it was a fabulous hotel to go if you are in Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: An elegant, memorable stay defined by exceptional service, beautiful surroundings, and outstanding hospitality.
sample_comments.positives: A truly beautiful hotel with exceptional attention to detail. The food was outstanding, and I loved both my room and the elegant décor throughout. The staff were incredible --- warm, professional, and attentive --- with special thanks to Jessi, who went above and beyond to make the stay memorable. The spa experience was equally impressive, with excellent facilities and a wonderful team. I highly recommend this hotel and very much look forward to returning. Thank you for an unforgettable stay.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: 5* It Is
sample_comments.text:
Feels like a true 5* experience. Stayed for 1 night only, so did not get to experience many facilities, but design, quality, cleanliness, rooms, breakfast, WiFi, and, of course, service are all 5*.

Special thank you to Kathy, who not only was super nice and helpful throughout my stay, but even remembered my name. 

Two minor negatives:
- Both rooftop and dining room bars close before 10 PM. These are bars, not kindergarten, and they are in a small town where mostly everything gets closed before 10. Leaving at least one open would keep the guests happy and generate income, I believe.
- It is about a 10-minute ride from the Old Town. But with Vietnamese taxi prices, this is not a big deal.

I would definitely stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Lovely, charming, modern hotel
sample_comments.positives: Attractive, modern hotel in a good location just outside the busy center of Hoi An. We walked into town the first day but afterwards caught cars very easily. The staff were very friendly and welcoming especially Jay and Ame who took great care of us. The rooms were large, comfortable and clean. Breakfast was very good with great coffee, they even had juice machines.
sample_comments.negatives: The upper pool and its bar looked good but the water was a bit chilly for this time of the year, though probably perfect when it gets hotter. I didn't try the lower pool.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional staff
sample_comments.text: We very much enjoyed our stay at the Grand Sunrise Palace. The staff were all so welcoming and concerned to make our stay as pleasurable as possible. In particular Lily, Ame and Josie took very good care of us. We thought the hotel discount vouchers were a nice touch and enjoyed the spa ones especially. Our room was comfortable and impeccably clean. The hotel is a little out of town, but the shuttle bus makes getting into Hoi An old town very easy and they even put on extra trips when the service was very busy. The breakfast buffet was ample with a wide choice and we also thought the restaurant food was very tasty.

sample_comments.title: I regret only booking the first 2 days of the 6-day itinerary in Hoi An. ㅠ
sample_comments.text:
I booked and visited only the first two days of a six-day trip to Hoi An, but I loved it so much that I tried to extend my stay for four more days, only to find out that it was fully booked, which was the biggest regret of this trip --- this hotel was extremely satisfying. 
Room and Hygiene: The hotel is really clean, and the interior is beautiful. At the hotel I stayed before in Da Nang, the shower filter turned yellow quickly, which made me uncomfortable, but here, the filter did not change color at all during my stay, so the water quality was very reliable. 
Service: All the staff members are very friendly. In particular, the staff named 'Koi', 'Gigi' from the reception, and 'V' from the restaurant were truly attentive, engaged in conversation, and prioritized the convenience of the guests, which touched me throughout my stay. The service was comparable to a five-star hotel. 
Location and Convenience: There is a shuttle limousine bus that goes back and forth between the Old Town and Cua Dai Beach, so I saved on transportation costs and moved around very comfortably. 
With all this quality and affordable prices, I can only say it's perfect. I highly recommend it to anyone visiting Hoi An. When I come to Hoi An next time, I will definitely stay here for the entire duration!

About the room
It was very clean and comfortable. The only slightly inconvenient aspects were the limited storage around the sink and the high placement of the closet hangers, but overall it was spacious, clean, and easy to use. Water was also replenished daily.

About the service
It was simply wonderful. I especially received great help from Tiffany. It seemed that I could consult about shuttle bus and spa reservations via WhatsApp, but I was having trouble logging into WhatsApp, and Tiffany informed me that she could also respond via LINE. Not only did she assist with airport shuttle and spa reservations through chat, but she also sent a photo of the meeting place for the shuttle bus return, and when I encountered a minor issue, she kindly called me via LINE to provide support. The service was attentive and considerate.

There was a wide variety of breakfast options, and room service was reasonably priced. The benefits for consecutive stays are great, so I definitely recommend staying multiple nights!

sample_comments.title: Our best Hotel stay in four years of full-time travel!
sample_comments.positives:
This is simply one of the world's best hotels. My wife and I have stayed in over 200 hotels over the last few years and the staff and service here were the best we have experienced. To begin with I was delayed an extra day in arriving, and my wife found herself alone in Vietnam. The staff particularly, Ella and Kathy, immediately adopted her as though she were a younger sister to make sure she was taken care of, even though she was old enough to be their mother. I cannot tell you how much both of us appreciate their extra care for her. Word spread, and the rest of the staff were checking up on her and both of us once I arrived. 

Each time you enter or leave the hotel you are greeted and you can tell there is a genuine desire among all of the staff to make sure all of your wants are met. From a security standpoint, though it wasn't mentioned I also even noted that the security guard who stays at the front of the hotel at all time took a photo of the vehicle plate when we arrived or departed with taxi drivers on every occasion. You are mad at the door, greeted as you pass through reception and even every member of the staff we met in the hallways, took the time to smile and say hello. 

The food in the restaurant was some of the better food we had in Vietnam, and like every other part of the hotel, the service was impeccable. The hotel itself is done in a black-and-white 50s movie set style design, which feels as though you have stepped back in time. We absolutely loved it and this doesn't even touch on how great our room was. A Grab taxi to get anywhere you want in the city is well under two dollars and you are staying in a much better hotel than anything in the old section. Do yourself a favor, choose to stay with the Grand Sunrise Palace. No, this is not a paid announcement ., simply after four years of full-time travel we have never felt like we were in better hands.
sample_comments.negatives: There is absolutely nothing to dislike, thank you so much for our stay.
