sample_comments.title: Hoi An Hotel Recommendations
sample_comments.text:
When staying in Hoi An, the most important thing for me was a quiet and comfortable room, and I was very satisfied.

I recommend this place to those who dislike the crowded and bustling atmosphere of places like Hoi An Old Town. The accommodation was quiet and also had a great location, taking less than 10 minutes to reach the Old Town by Grab.

The room was very clean, and they consistently cleaned during my stay, allowing me to be comfortable. While waiting for the room inspection at check-out, staff member Ella kindly offered coffee and attended to me warmly, leaving me with a pleasant final impression.

If I visit Hoi An again, this is definitely a place I would like to stay at again .

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Kathy was helpful and good service

sample_comments.title: Great Hotel!
sample_comments.text: We stayed 3 nights- staff was amazing, food was fantastic, and room very spacious and well provided. The location too is great- away from hustle and bustle of old town- easy access to Ang Ban beech and regular shuttles to old town. We wished to have stayed longer and can certainly recommend without hesitation. Special shout out to Ame, Ella and all the restaurant and spa staff!

sample_comments.title: Excellent value for money
sample_comments.positives: The attention to details of the staff, good recommendations, the food, and special thanks to Luna!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
My stay at Grand Sunrise Palace was made unforgettable thanks to the incredible hospitality of the staff. I want to give a special shout-out to Kathy and Luna at the front desk for going above and beyond.
• Kathy: She is incredibly enthusiastic and warm. From the moment I arrived, her energy and helpfulness made me feel right at home. She truly cares about the guests' experience.
• Luna: I was so impressed to find out she has only been learning Mandarin for two months! Her Chinese is already quite good, and more importantly, she is incredibly sincere and diligent in her communication. Her effort to bridge the language gap was both helpful and very touching.
The entire team is professional, sincere, and hardworking. They made every aspect of my visit smooth and pleasant. If you're visiting Hoi An, this hotel is a fantastic choice---not just for the facilities, but for the wonderful people who work here.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Chen, 
Thank you so much for your wonderful review. We're truly delighted to hear that you had an unforgettable stay with us. Kathy and Luna will be very happy to receive your kind compliments, especially your recognition of Luna's efforts in learning Mandarin.
We sincerely appreciate your recommendation and look forward to welcoming you back to Hoi An soon

sample_comments.title: EXCEPTIONAL
sample_comments.positives: My partner and I had an amazing experience at the Grand Sunrise Palace. It offers a luxurious stay that is clean, comfortable, and equipped with fantastic facilities. A big shoutout to the entire staff, who were incredibly kind and made our stay even better, especially Jessi, Ame, Jay, Koi, and Adi. Thank you very much!

sample_comments.title: Highly recommended
sample_comments.text: Wonderful stay at Grand Sunrise! The rooms are clean and spacious with very comfortable beds. Great breakfast buffet with plenty of variety. Huge thanks to the staff for their hospitality, especially Ella, who went above and beyond

sample_comments.title: Excellent staff make this property 5 star plus!
sample_comments.positives: The hotel facilities, the spa and the convenience of the shuttle bus. But nothing can top the amazing staff, especially Luna who went out of her way every day to make our stay that much more amazing! Thank you to Khoi as well who was our driver who provided great conversation and interesting information. We will be back
sample_comments.negatives: We loved everything!

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel. Friendly staff.
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at the Grand Sunrise Palace Hotel for a couple of nights to break up our stay at in Danang. We very much enjoyed our stay. 
Nothing was too much trouble for the wonderful staff. Especially Ame and Ella! Thank you. 
Location was good. Just far enough out of the old town for a more relaxed feel, but close enough to walk into town if you are feeling energetic.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mark,
Thank you so much for choosing to stay with us at Grand Sunrise Palace and for sharing your lovely feedback. We're delighted that you enjoyed your time with us and found our location to be the perfect balance between relaxation and easy access to the Old Town.
Your kind words about our team truly mean a lot. Ame and Ella will be especially happy to know they helped make your stay so enjoyable.
It was a pleasure hosting you during your trip, and we hope to welcome you back again in the future.

sample_comments.title: Super friendly staff Kathy!
sample_comments.positives: The rooms were clean and the staff was super friendly! Breakfast was nice.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Great holiday
sample_comments.text: Great place to stay! Outstanding staff, especially Ame, Jay and Ella. Excellent breakfast, great room. Well worth the stay! I would definitely recommend this place and I would stay here again next time I'm in Hoi An
sample_comments.response:
Dear Michael, 
Thank you so much for your fantastic review! We're truly delighted that you enjoyed your stay, from the excellent breakfast and great room to the service provided by our team.
Ame, Jay, and Ella will be especially happy to receive your kind compliments. Your recognition means a great deal to all of us.
Thank you for your recommendation --- we would be absolutely thrilled to welcome you back the next time you're in Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: It was amazing! I loved it here so much. No problems and ease.
sample_comments.positives: Everything was so luxurious and clean. I was so obsessed with the facilities. Kathy was the best.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing tbh.

sample_comments.title: Boutique Hotel
sample_comments.text:
The location may not be ideal if you want to be in the Old Town but a 6 minute drive isn't difficult with Grab or the hotel shuttle. Goi, the driver was really fun, engaging and friendly during our ride to the Old Town. The front desk and staff were genuinely kind and helpful and Luna was always there for us and provided her number to answer any questions or concerns to enjoy our stay. 

The hotel touches were refined and we enjoyed our room details, bath tub and dining facilities. The bed was terrific! 

Luna, thank you once again and all the best in your mandarin class. 

John & Carline
sample_comments.response:
Dear John & Carline,
Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We're glad you enjoyed our location and shuttle options, and especially appreciated Goi's fun and friendly driving as well as Luna's attentive support throughout your stay. It's great to know you loved the room details, bathtub, and dining facilities --- and we'll be sure to pass your kind words along to the entire team. We look forward to welcoming you back again soon!

sample_comments.title: Amazing!!! Absolutely loved it and will be back
sample_comments.positives: Perfect location, amazing staff, beautiful hotel and facilities!!!
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing - it was perfect

sample_comments.title: 3 nights and 4 days trip to Hoi An
sample_comments.text: After eight years since my last visit in 2018, I visited again for a memorable 4-day, 3-night trip at the Grand Sunrise Palace Hoian hotel, located somewhat far from the Old Town. It was an unforgettable experience. The clean, quiet, and spacious room, fresh and delicious breakfast, and facilities like massage services and the swimming pool all met my expectations. I am especially grateful to *** for their exceptionally kind guidance from the moment I arrived until check-out. If I come back to Da Nang again, I would love to stay at this hotel. I have fond memories of the beautiful cafes and delicious restaurants in the area. It was truly a happy and enjoyable trip.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Nackyoung, 
Thank you so much for your heartfelt review! We're truly honored that you chose to stay with us again after 8 years and that your 3-night stay was full of unforgettable memories. We're delighted you enjoyed the quiet and clean room, delicious breakfast, massage and pool facilities, and that our team's attentive service - made your stay even more special. Your kind words mean a lot to us and we hope to welcome you back again soon for another wonderful experience!

sample_comments.title: The staff were exceptional, the place was beautiful and amazing value!
sample_comments.positives: The restaurant, rooms, pools and everywhere between are so beautiful

sample_comments.title: Fabulous boutique hotel
sample_comments.text: We extended our stay at this beautiful hotel the staff are really good so friendly ,Amie on reception is so good at her job always friendly and professional. The rooms are very clean ,bed is also super comfy the pool look great, unfortunately for us it was not warm enough to swim while we were there mid January.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Gillian, 
Thank you very much for your kind review. We're delighted to hear that you extended your stay and enjoyed our friendly staff, clean rooms, and comfortable bed. A special thank you for your lovely words about Amie---she will be very happy to know her friendly and professional service made a difference. We hope to welcome you back again, perhaps in warmer weather so you can enjoy the pool as well.

sample_comments.title: We loved our stay and highly recommend this hotel!
sample_comments.positives: We had a fantastic time at the Grand Sunrise Palace hotel in Hoi An. The location was ideal as it is close to the the centre of old Hoi An but still away from the craziness and hustle and bustle. We loved taking a hotel bicycle out to explore the lovely local neighbourhood and riding through rice paddies and lovely local streets. The hotel facilities all excellent, with two pools to choose from. The hotel room was large and spotless and we loved the balcony overlooking the pool. The restaurant and breakfasts were delicious. A highlight was the wonderful service and assistance we received from Kathy at the hotel front desk. Kathy made us feel so welcome and provided us with all the advice we needed to make the most of our stay. I highly recommend this hotel!

sample_comments.title: Excellent stay
sample_comments.text: Unfortunately was only in Hoi An for 1one night and I stayed here. The staff were amazing from the Bro Jay to the lovely Ella and all the other amazing staff. They had amazingly polite. The food was great especially the breakfast. Dinner with live music with amazing Instruments was cool as well. We were the only ones to swim but the pool was cool as well even tho it was cold haha. Big thanks to everyone again (All staff). 10/10 stay here

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Talk about little heaven on earth from the architecture to the warmth of the staff to the most comfortable bed, stylish room, the extra touch in my room, to the spa treatment, it was all a 100/10..

A special shoutout to Jay who welcomed me like I was his long lost sister, he was just superb!!!

How can I forget the amazing ladies at the spa, the best spa treatment I ever had!! 

The hotel is a true palace
sample_comments.negatives: Everything was just perfect.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Exceptional service n hospitality by Lobby manager Jay n his team
sample_comments.response:
Dear Tian,
Thank you very much for your kind words. We're delighted to hear that you had an exceptional experience with our Lobby Manager Jay and his team. Your appreciation truly motivates us to continue delivering excellent service and hospitality. We look forward to welcoming you again.

sample_comments.title: Had an amazing stay here and we were very happy about the super nice, polite and professional service from
sample_comments.positives: Jay

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: I was very satisfied with my choice of Hotel. It's a very nice place to stay. Especialty Jay is a very good manager for very needs.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jean,
Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We're delighted to hear that you were very satisfied with your choice of hotel and enjoyed your stay with us. Your special mention of Jay is truly appreciated, and we will be happy to share your compliments with him. We hope to welcome you back again soon.

sample_comments.title: Convenient and comfortable stay
sample_comments.positives:
Ella was so polite and helpful during our stay at Grand Sunrise Palace. The hotel was lovely and booking shuttles to the old town was very convenient.
Chef Trong was also great. Since we only eat Halal food he brought many vegetarian options to our table and made us feel comfortable when having breakfast.
We would recommend having more halal friendly food or vegan /vegetarian options as most of the options in the buffet had non halal meats.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful property
sample_comments.text: We stayed at this place for 2 days. The rooms are spacious. Staff is excellent, specially Ame who take care of our needs.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Abhishek, 
Thank you very much for your kind feedback! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your spacious room and that Ame took great care of your needs. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Very good hotel near the old town but far enough from the hustle and bustle. The rooms are very spacious and well equipped. Breakfast was superb. We spent 5 very relaxing days. We got complimentary afternoon teas and foot massage. A special thanks to Kathy so took care of us during our whole stay. Great service. Will definitely come again ....

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Great service, value for money, 2 pools. Special shout out to customer service personal Luna for here attentive service, friendly smile and wonderful attitude! Thank you Sunrise Palace!

sample_comments.title: I will return ! Best staff
sample_comments.positives:
Amazing reception ! Ella and her colleagues are wonderful 
The room is huge and the breakfast is so varied
sample_comments.negatives:
weak WiFi 
No body lotion

sample_comments.title: Good service, breakfast and staff
sample_comments.text: We were served by Luna who was very friendly. She was also very multilingual and was earnestly practicing mandarin with us. The hotel's hospitality was top notch and the room was spacious and comfortable. Location wise it was about 10 mins grab ride from Hoi An old town. If you book the hotel transport one hour in advance you will also be able to get a free shuttle service to and from old town. Overall the stay was pleasant and I would consider coming back. Cảm ơn !

sample_comments.title: Amazing staff, great spa and luxury rooms
sample_comments.positives:
The rooms were amazing and we really enjoyed the location. It was close to the Old Town but still quiet at night to get some sleep!

We also want to express how amazing Lilly was during our stay! She was so friendly and helpful with anything we needed in the hotel and venturing outside of the hotel. Extremely attentive and always really quick with a solution!

Oh... and can't forget the spa!!!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Hotel is good overall. Ame also provided great services.

sample_comments.title: Luna's warmth and exceptional service made our stay truly memorable.
sample_comments.positives:
I had a wonderful stay at this hotel! From the moment we arrived, the receptionist, Luna, made me feel so welcome. She was extremely helpful, full of warmth and friendliness, and went above and beyond to assist us---even taking the time to say goodbye and also assisted us on her day off. Truly exceptional service!

The room was very nice and offered great value for the price. Everything was clean, comfortable, and well taken care of, making our stay even more enjoyable.

We also tried the in-house spa, which was a highlight. The treatments were of excellent quality, yet very reasonably priced.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Lily at the front desk is the best!
sample_comments.text:
We had a wonderful time at the Grand Sunrise! It was off the strip so not overrun with people and noise. The breakfast buffet was beyond amazing!!! You can make your own juices. There is a kind barista. All the normal 5-star breakfast options plus a chocolate fountain!! 

The staff were all so accommodatingu and lovely --- especially Lily at the front desk. She made perfect recommendations, helped us arrange some activities, always greeted us with a smile and looked out for us. As a mother traveling alone with her kiddo, I couldn't ask for a better hotel experience in Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: Extraordinary
sample_comments.positives:
We had an incredible experience at this hotel! From the moment we arrived, everything exceeded our expectations. The ambiance is absolutely beautiful and everything is spotless - clearly very well-maintained.

What truly made our stay unforgettable was the staff, especially Kathy. She went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and enjoying our time. She was incredibly sweet, always checking in with us, and even gave us fantastic recommendations for places to visit in the area. Her warm and friendly personality truly made us feel at home.

Thanks to Kathy and the overall wonderful experience, we'll definitely be coming back. Highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a relaxing and welcoming place to stay!
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing the hotel was amazing.....

sample_comments.title: Great Stay in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Love my stay in this Palace Hotel. Everything is so nicely decorated, room and surrounding ambience are so lovely crafted. Will definitely come back. Thanks for the fabulous services

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: I'm very happy when I can made friend with Kathy. She so lovely and kindly. Can't wait for comeback

sample_comments.title: Very attention staff
sample_comments.text: Special about out to Ella and Kathy for taking such good care of us.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Kathy was wonderful and helped us with all our plans while we were in town! I can't recommend this place enough for anyone wanting to visit Hoi An

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: An absolute pleasure to have stayed in this very special and probably the most professional establishment! A credit to the owners of this stylish building! Will definitely recommend and look forward to coming back

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Jessi and Luna, excellent staff and perfect service. Will be back soon!

sample_comments.title: Top hotel!
sample_comments.text: The staff, in particular Luna and Ame were out of this world. I cannot fault this hotel and its staff- it is 100 per cent worth staying here for your time in HoiAn. A little out of the main city madness but good food options near by, very close to cycling on the rice fields. Free bikes and shuttles TF to town

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Jessi and Luna, excellent service. We are really happy with them. Will come back soon!

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel with great service
sample_comments.text: Lovely hotel with great service, and the staff especially Luna were very friendly. Thumbs up!

sample_comments.title: Very clean, beautiful, great staff, perfect stay!
sample_comments.positives: This was the most beautiful hotel that we stayed in in Vietnam. Great facilities and amenities.

sample_comments.title: Amazing staff
sample_comments.text:
Beautiful hotel, comfortable rooms and lovely breakfast. We were here for the major floods in oct 25. Flooding didn't really affect the hotel itself but roads were blocked and everything in Hoi An closed down. we were a little nervous about getting back to da nang for our flight so we left a few days early. The staff were amazing throughout our stay but particularly went above and beyond in helping us get through the floods to passable roads to get out. For example Kath made me wear her shoes and held on to me to walk us through a muddy field as she was concerned about me falling (I'm pregnant)/she didn't think my own shoes were up to the job (she was right). She also helped coordinate with a new hotel and made sure we had a taxi waiting for us. With her help the process was super smooth and low stress albeit a little muddy. Meanwhile she's cheerful and kind despite working an extra long day helping guests while her own family deal with the floods too. 

Can't speak highly enough of the staff here. From helping our toddler in and out of taxis to booking things and appearing with extra pillows or umbrellas or whatever you need. Thanks everyone!

sample_comments.title: Excellent stay, very accommodating, and close to all main attractions.
sample_comments.positives: Excellent stay. Very satisfied with the hotel, and Was very satisfied with the hotel and it's cleanliness. Kathy, and her team provided amazing service, I would rebook with this hotel whenever I come back.

sample_comments.title: Recommend!
sample_comments.text:
First of all, I'd like to mention Jessi the front desk receptionist. From the first day we got there she gave us her number letting us know we can contact her for whatever we need or with any questions or recommendations. She was there for whatever request we had or if we wanted to schedule anything. Jessi went above and beyond especially when I had already checked out and I forgot my pajamas there. She offered to have it delivered to me through grab and kept me updated the whole time. She's definitely made our stay so wonderful and comfortable. We really appreciated her hospitality!

The breakfast buffet was one of the better buffets I've had at a hotel and me and partner really enjoyed the variety they had. 

The only complaint I would have is that for the option of getting a bigger bed, it's actually 2 doubles put together and the beds were very firm so it was pretty uncomfortable for my partner.

sample_comments.title: Amazing, luxurious and awesome
sample_comments.positives:
The property is amazing with super friendly staff who welcome you and process your check-in whilst you enjoy a nice cool elevated lemonade drink and a little snack.. not to forget the ice cold refreshing towel that my face was longing for after the heat. At every turn and point there was a smiling face and a special mention to Ella and Lily who have been super delightful and ready to help. Not to forget the other staff including the restaurant and breakfast team who are willing to guide you on any dietary requirements and just a call away. It's also a short complimentary ride to old town.

I cannot recommend this place enough and I look forward to coming and staying for a longer duration.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Wonderful stay in Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Jay & Luna's service were great, very hospitable and friendly. The room was spacious and comfortable for a 2 night stay.

sample_comments.title: Luxury affordable hotel with warm welcoming staff
sample_comments.positives: This is one of the best hotel we've stayed, anywhere. First is the service excellence of the hotel staff. Our host, Lilly, greeted and welcomed us everyday like we are in her home. She really took excellent care of us in our entire stay. What amazed us is that all the hotel staff provided the same warm and friendly services. The hotel itself is modern and well equipped - only 2-year old, 2 pools, roof top pool and bar, sauna, jacuzzi, free bikes, fantastic breakfast included (excellent local cuisines and with staff constantly cleaning tables), afternoon tea, live music at night, high speed WiFi, and an exceptional in-house spa. The hotel location is perfect - close but not too close to Old Town, 15-minute ride to the Cua Dai Beach, and nearby paved bike paths thru the rice fields, custom tailor shop and laundry across the street.

sample_comments.title: 99% perfect
sample_comments.text: Great hospitality with value. Shd provide more shuttle schedules instead travelling to old town

sample_comments.title: Wonderful
sample_comments.positives: Everything but the most is their happy, warmth, gracious staff specially Jessi

sample_comments.title: Worth the money
sample_comments.text: The hotel is superb, wish we could've stayed longer. Jay from reception was the most accommodating staff I've met here in Vietnam - thank you Jay! Breakfast Facilities . They also offer a shuttle going to and from the city center.

sample_comments.title: Jessi made our stay worth every penny we spent
sample_comments.positives: The Hotel is superb, from the interior decor to the best possible service they can offer, it feels like coming home with a warm welcome you will feel you are their most treasured guest specially Jessi who check us in and continue to offer her service 24/7, she is always available for help no matter the time, she can book our free ride to old town & back to hotel, i am most grateful to Jessi for facilitating my spa appointment when it was fully booked that night and i was able to enjoy & find relief after a day walk.

secondary.description_full:
Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An

Khám phá Hội An nhiều hơn khi quý khách ở lại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An và trải nghiệm tất cả những lợi ích của vị trí thực sự trung tâm.
Hãy tận dụng vô vàn dịch vụ và tiện ích không có gì sánh được tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An. Khách sạn cung cấp quyền truy cập internet miễn phí giúp quý khách giữ liên lạc trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.
Lên kế hoạch trước cho chuyến đi đến và đi từ sân bay của quý khách với các dịch vụ vận tải dễ dàng đặt trước của khách sạn. Các dịch vụ taxi, cho thuê xe hơi và xe đưa đón được khách sạn cung cấp giúp quý khách dễ dàng lên kế hoạch cho các chuyến đi trong ngày, chuyến tham quan và hơn thế nữa quanh Hội An. Nếu quý khách dự định đến bằng xe hơi, quý khách sẽ đánh giá cao bãi đỗ xe miễn phí ngay tại chỗ của khách sạn. Luôn nhận được sự hỗ trợ quý khách cần với các dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm két sắt, nhận phòng hoặc trả phòng nhanh, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng.
Nếu quý khách cần, chuyến du lịch và dịch vụ vé thậm chí có thể giúp quý khách đặt vé và đặt chỗ tại tất cả các buổi trình diễn và chương trình hay nhất gần đó. Khách sạn thậm chí cung cấp lò sưởi để mang đến không khí ấm áp vào những đêm lạnh giá. Dịch vụ giặt khô và dịch vụ giặt là tại chỗ của khách sạn giúp quý khách giữ những bộ trang phục du lịch yêu thích của mình sạch sẽ để quý khách có thể đóng gói đồ đạc ít hơn. Cảm thấy lười biếng? Các tiện ích trong phòng như dịch vụ tại phòng, dịch vụ tại phòng 24 giờ và dọn phòng hằng ngày giúp quý khách tận dụng tối đa thời gian trong phòng. Quý khách cũng có thể mua những món đồ du lịch và đồ lặt vặt tại cửa hàng tiện lợi mà không cần phải rời Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An. Vì lý do sức khỏe, hút thuốc bị cấm tại bất kỳ nơi nào trong khuôn viên khách sạn. Chỉ được phép hút thuốc tại các khu vực hút thuốc được chỉ định do khách sạn cung cấp. Phòng nghỉ có tất cả tiện nghi mà quý khách cần để có một đêm ngủ ngon giấc. Một số phòng được trang bị rèm che ánh sáng và điều hòa để thuận tiện cho quý khách. Mỗi thời gian ở là một trải nghiệm mới với nhiều tùy chọn bố trí phòng thú vị tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An, bao gồm các phòng có ban công hoặc sân hiên và phòng khách riêng. Giải trí trong phòng như truyền hình cáp và ti-vi được cung cấp cho khách trong một số phòng được chọn. Quý khách có thể yên tâm khi biết rằng máy pha trà hoặc cà phê, nước đóng chai, cà phê hòa tan và tủ lạnh nhỏ chứa đồ uống, trà hòa tan và tủ lạnh sẵn có trong một số phòng chọn lọc. Quý khách có thể luôn sảng khoái và sạch sẽ với áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc và vật dụng tắm rửa được cung cấp trong một số phòng tắm của khách.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Mỗi buổi sáng, quý khách có thể thức dậy để thưởng thức bữa sáng ngon miễn phí tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An. Mọi người đều thích một tách cà phê ngon! Một quán cà phê ngay trong khuôn viên có nghĩa là quý khách có thể thưởng thức một tách cà phê thật sự, mới pha vào mỗi buổi sáng -- hoặc bất cứ lúc nào quý khách thích. Nếu không muốn ra ngoài ăn, quý khách luôn có thể chọn các lựa chọn ăn uống ngon miệng tại khách sạn. Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An sẵn sàng phục vụ nhu cầu cụ thể nhất của quý khách. Các lựa chọn loại món ăn bao gồm ăn kiêng theo luật Hồi giáo, có sẵn cho những khách nghỉ có hạn chế về chế độ ăn uống.
Một đêm tại quán bar của khách sạn có thể thú vị như một đêm đi chơi với những người đồng hành của quý khách. Quý khách có thể chọn giao thực phẩm đến tận phòng mình tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An, để ăn uống thuận tiện và dễ dàng. Nếu quý khách thực sự ăn uống kén chọn, quý khách sẽ biết ơn vì Tiện nghi nấu nướng ngoài trời tại chỗ có sẵn ở đây.
Hàng loạt dịch vụ giải trí của khách sạn đảm bảo quý khách có nhiều việc để làm trong thời gian quý khách ở lại đây. Kết thúc những ngày trong kỳ nghỉ của quý khách đúng điệu bằng cách ghé vào tiệm làm đẹp, mát-xa, xông khô, bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông ướt và spa.
Các dịch vụ tại Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An đảm bảo quý khách luôn có thể tham gia nhiều hoạt động trong thời gian lưu trú. Và không có kỳ nghỉ nào kết thúc một cách hoàn hảo nếu quý khách không dành thời gian thư giãn tại bể bơi. Quầy bar bên bể bơi của khách sạn cho phép quý khách thưởng thức khoảng thời gian uống cocktail bình dị nhất với món đồ uống dịu ngọt. Với những người không thích bỏ lỡ buổi tập luyện nào, một chuyến đi tới trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn sẽ giúp quý khách luôn sảng khoái và khỏe mạnh.

childPolicies.description: Lưu trú miễn phí khi sử dụng giường có sẵn. Lưu ý, nếu quý khách cần cũi em bé, việc này có thể phát sinh thêm phụ phí và phụ thuộc vào tình trạng thực tế.

childPolicies.policy: Trẻ em 4-5 tuổi [bao gồm cả bé 5 tuổi]
childPolicies.description: Ở miễn phí nếu sử dụng giường có sẵn.

extrabedPolicies.description: Giường phụ tùy thuộc vào loại phòng bạn chọn, xin vui lòng kiểm tra thông tin phòng để biết thêm chi tiết.

policyNotes: Việc nhận phòng sớm tùy thuộc vào tình trạng thực tế. Vui lòng liên hệ với cơ sở lưu trú để biết thêm thông tin.

Trẻ em dưới 5 tuổi được miễn phí. Tối đa 2 trẻ em mỗi phòng.
• Trẻ em từ 6 đến 11 tuổi sẽ được tính phí 250.000 VND mỗi trẻ mỗi đêm cho bữa sáng khi sử dụng giường sẵn có.
• Trẻ em từ 12 tuổi trở lên được coi là người lớn.

embedding_text:
Grand Sunrise Palace Hội An (Grand Sunrise Palace Hoi An) - khách sạn 5.0 sao tại Hội An.
Địa chỉ: 320 Cua Dai Street, Cam Chau, Hoi An City, Cẩm Châu, Hội An, Việt Nam.
Đỗ xe và Wi-Fi luôn miễn phí, vì vậy quý khách có thể giữ liên lạc, đến và đi tùy ý. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Cẩm Châu của Hội An, chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Đừng rời đi trước khi ghé thăm Phố cổ Hội An nổi tiếng. Được xếp hạng 5 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng mát-xa, bể bơi ngoài trời và xông khô ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Ban công/sân hiên, Bàn làm việc, Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi đỗ xe [gần bên], Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bãi đỗ xe có nhân viên, Bãi đỗ xe đạp, Bình chữa cháy, Băng niêm phong phòng dành cho khách sau khi vệ sinh, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi, Bể bơi có tầm nhìn, Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bệnh xá, Bồn ngâm chân, Bồn tắm, Bồn tắm nước nóng, Bồn tắm/vòi sen riêng, Bộ chuyển đổi nguồn, Bữa sáng, Bữa sáng Halal, Bữa sáng [miễn phí], Bữa sáng [tự chọn], Bữa sáng kiểu Tây, Bữa sáng kiểu Á, Bữa sáng đầy đủ kiểu Mỹ, Bữa ăn cho trẻ, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung.
Điểm đánh giá 9.7/10 dựa trên 10551 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Bữa sáng, Độ sạch sẽ, Địa điểm, Bể bơi, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Kích thước phòng, Nhận phòng.
Các loại phòng: Suite Hạng Tổng Thống (Presidential Suite); Premier giường đôi (Premier Double); Phòng Loại Sang Giường Đôi (Deluxe Double Room); Phòng Suite Cao cấp, Ban công (Luxury Suite, Balcony); PRESIDENTIAL ROOM,BALCONY; Suite Sang Trọng (Luxury Suite); PREMIER DOUBLE OR TWIN ROOM,BALCONY; Suite đặc biệt (Signature Suite).
Gần: Nhà thuốc, Việt Huệ, Sarah's Boutique, Đất 513m, Cửa hàng Bầu Trời Đỏ, Aum Yoga Việt Nam.
